device_name: NvisionVLE Imaging System, NvisionVLE Optical Probe, NvisionVLE Inflation System
intended_use: The NvisionVLE® Imaging System is indicated for use as an imaging tool in the evaluation of human tissue microstructure, including esophageal tissue microstructure, by providing two-dimensional, cross
intended_use_full: The NvisionVLE® Imaging System is indicated for use as an imaging tool in the evaluation of human tissue microstructure, including esophageal tissue microstructure, by providing two-dimensional, cross-sectional, real-time depth visualization and may be used to mark areas of tissue. The software provides segmentation and display of common imaging features, including hyper-reflective surface, layering, and hypo-reflective structures.
target_condition: Evaluation of tissue microstructure, including esophageal tissue microstructure
ground_truth: Manually labeled regions of interest (ROIs) by trained experts in clinical interpretation of VLE imagery; 40% sequestered subset of 1000-patient NvisionVLE Clinical Registry study
other_metrics: Tissue Surface: True Positive Detection Fraction 92.9% (95% CI lower limit 89.0%), True Negative Detection Fraction 95.0% (95% CI lower limit 91.2%); Layering: True Positive Detection Fraction 89.6% (95% CI lower limit 84.8%), True Negative Detection Fraction 97.8% (95% CI lower limit 94.9%); Hypo-Reflective Structures: True Positive Detection Fraction 91.1% (95% CI lower limit 86.2%), True Negative Detection Fraction 92.9% (95% CI lower limit 89.1%)
